message:
refactor(search,fuzz,pages): simplify search query pipeline and fuzz target adjustments

- Major search query simplification removing ~171 lines of redundant
  code paths consolidated in prior expansions
- Pages module registration adjustments
- Fuzz target minor refinements (chunked, kdf)
